title: Introducing Brand Studio: The creative production platform powered by your brand
summary: We’re excited to introduce Brand Studio by Stability AI, the end-to-end creative production platform powered by your brand.

title: Stability AI Joins the Tech Coalition
summary: We’re pleased to share that Stability AI has joined the Tech Coalition, a global alliance of leading technology companies working together to combat online child sexual exploitation and abuse.

title: Warner Music Group and Stability AI Join Forces To Build The Next Generation Of Responsible AI Tools For Music Creation
summary: Warner Music Group and Stability AI today announced a collaborative effort to advance the use of responsible AI in music creation, combining WMG’s long-standing advocacy for principled innovation with Stability AI’s expertise and leadership in commercially-safe generative audio.

title: Universal Music Group and Stability AI Announce Strategic Alliance to Co-Develop Professional AI Music Creation Tools
summary: Universal Music Group and Stability AI today announced a strategic alliance to develop next-generation professional music creation tools, powered by responsibly trained generative AI and built to support the creative process of artists, producers and songwriters globally.

title: Stability AI and EA Partner to Empower Artists, Designers, and Developers to Reimagine Game Development
summary: Stability AI and Electronic Arts (EA) have formed a strategic partnership to co-develop transformative generative AI models, tools, and workflows that empower EA’s artists, designers, and developers to reimagine how games are made.

title: Stability AI Brings Image Services to Amazon Bedrock, Delivering End-to-End Creative Control with Enterprise-Grade Infrastructure
summary: Today, we're excited to announce we’re expanding our partnership with Amazon Web Services to bring our Stable Image Services to Amazon Bedrock.

title: Stability AI’s Annual Integrity Transparency Report
summary: At Stability AI, we are committed to building and deploying generative AI responsibly, and we believe that transparency is foundational to safe and ethical AI.

title: Stability AI Introduces Stable Audio 2.5, the First Audio Model Built for Enterprise Sound Production at Scale
summary: We’re excited to release Stable Audio 2.5, our latest audio model and the first developed for enterprise-grade use cases. Stable Audio 2.5 introduces advancements in quality and control that address the demand for dynamic compositions that can be adapted for custom brand needs.

title: Context Caching is Available 2024/08/02
summary: The DeepSeek API now supports V4-Pro and V4-Flash, available via both the OpenAI ChatCompletions interface and the Anthropic interface. To access the new models, the base_url remains unchanged, and the model parameter should be set to deepseek-v4-pro or deepseek-v4-flash .

title: New API Features 2024/07/25
summary: The DeepSeek API now supports V4-Pro and V4-Flash, available via both the OpenAI ChatCompletions interface and the Anthropic interface. To access the new models, the base_url remains unchanged, and the model parameter should be set to deepseek-v4-pro or deepseek-v4-flash .

title: GLM-5-Turbo launched as a new agent-focused foundation model
summary: Zhipu AI introduced GLM-5-Turbo as a base model optimized for agent scenarios, with deep training-level improvements to tool use and long-chain task execution. The page presents it as part of Zhipu's new-generation full-stack large-model system.

title: GLM-5 announced as Zhipu AI's new flagship foundation model for agent engineering
summary: Zhipu AI announced GLM-5 as a flagship base model aimed at agent engineering, highlighting open-source SOTA performance in coding and agent capabilities. The page also claims strong results on SWE-bench Verified and Terminal Bench 2.0, comparable to Claude Opus 4.5.

title: GLM-4.6V released as an open-source visual reasoning model
summary: Zhipu AI unveiled GLM-4.6V as a 100B-class open-source vision reasoning model with standout global performance. It is described as supporting native tool calling, automatic task completion, and 128K long context.

title: AutoGLM presented as an autonomous agent model
summary: Zhipu AI announced AutoGLM as an agent model with autonomous planning, reasoning, and execution capabilities. The company says it addresses key challenges in task planning, data scarcity, and policy optimization while enabling continuous self-improvement.

title: AutoClaw introduced as a computer agent product
summary: Zhipu AI featured AutoClaw as a product that can be installed on any computer in one minute, positioning it as part of its native AI product lineup. The page presents it as a specific named product rather than a generic platform feature.

title: GLM-OS concept announced alongside AutoGLM and GLM-PC
summary: On November 29, Zhipu AI said it formally proposed the GLM-OS concept and released two agent products: AutoGLM and GLM-PC. This marks a broader product announcement around the company's agent operating framework.

title: CogAgent-9B open-sourced as the base model for GLM-PC
summary: To support the large-model agent ecosystem, Zhipu AI open-sourced CogAgent-9B, the base model behind GLM-PC. The model version CogAgent-9B-20241220 is described as being trained from GLM-4V-9B for specialized agent tasks using only screenshots as input.

title: Agent OpenDay update highlighted cross-app and cross-device progress
summary: Zhipu AI shared new agent developments at its Agent OpenDay, including AutoGLM performing more than 50-step autonomous operations and handling cross-app tasks. The update also mentions a more automated web-browsing experience and GLM-PC entering internal testing.

title: Seed3D 2.0 Released: Higher Precision and Greater Usability
summary: ByteDance Seed announced the release of Seed3D 2.0, highlighting improved precision and better usability. The post presents it as a product update to the company’s 3D modeling or generation offering.

title: Introducing Seed Full-Duplex Speech LLM
summary: ByteDance Seed introduced Seed Full-Duplex Speech LLM, a speech model focused on attentive listening, robust interference suppression, and more natural interaction. The announcement positions it as a new model launch in the company’s speech AI lineup.

title: Dola-Seed-2.0-Preview Model Release on Arena
summary: ByteDance Seed announced the release of the Dola-Seed-2.0-Preview model on Arena. This is a named model release and appears to make an early preview version available for evaluation or testing.

title: Seed 2.0 Official Launch
summary: ByteDance Seed officially launched Seed 2.0. The announcement marks a major foundation model release in the company’s product portfolio.

title: Introducing Seedream 5.0 Lite
summary: ByteDance Seed introduced Seedream 5.0 Lite, emphasizing deeper thinking and more accurate generation. The post frames it as a new model announcement focused on improved generation quality.

title: Seedance 2.0 Official Launch
summary: ByteDance Seed officially launched Seedance 2.0. This is presented as a formal product release within the company’s model ecosystem.

title: Seed Prover 1.5
summary: ByteDance Seed announced Seed Prover 1.5, describing it as delivering advanced mathematical reasoning through a novel agentic architecture. The news highlights a specialized model release aimed at reasoning-heavy tasks.

title: Official Release of Seed1.8
summary: ByteDance Seed officially released Seed1.8, described as a generalized agentic model. The announcement positions it as a new model launch expanding the company’s agentic AI capabilities.

title: WorldWise Enterprise LLM Platform 2.5 update
summary: 01.AI announced an update to its WorldWise Enterprise LLM Platform 2.5, positioning 2026 as a critical year for enterprise deployment of multi-agent systems. The announcement frames the release as a major step in enterprise AI adoption.

title: 01.AI launches “Super Employee” enterprise AI agent
summary: 01.AI announced the launch of “Super Employee,” an enterprise AI agent. The company describes it as marking a shift into an era focused on delivering measurable business value through AI agents.

title: Yi-Lightning open-source model announcement
summary: 01.AI highlighted Yi-Lightning as a global state-of-the-art mixture-of-experts large language model and identified it as open-source. This is presented as a named model release/announcement on the homepage.

title: 01.AI LLM One-box Solution Machine receives CAICT certification
summary: 01.AI announced that its LLM One-box Solution Machine received top-level certification from CAICT. The certification is presented as a notable milestone for the company’s enterprise AI product offering.
